enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable the OpenClaw Task System plugin.

taskMessagePrefix.label: Message Prefix
taskMessagePrefix.help: Prefix added to task-system visible status messages such as receipts and watchdog updates.

pythonBin.label: Python Binary
pythonBin.help: Python executable used to invoke the task system runtime hooks.

runtimeRoot.label: Runtime Root
runtimeRoot.help: Optional runtime bundle root. Defaults to the installed plugin directory.

configPath.label: Config Path
configPath.help: Optional path to task_system.json. Defaults to <runtimeRoot>/config/task_system.json.

debugLogPath.label: Debug Log Path
debugLogPath.help: Optional file path for plugin hook trace logs. Defaults to <runtimeRoot>/data/plugin-debug.log.

sendImmediateAckOnRegister.label: Immediate Ack On Register
sendImmediateAckOnRegister.help: Immediately send a short acknowledgement when a new long task is first registered.

sendImmediateAckForShortTasks.label: Immediate Ack For Short Tasks
sendImmediateAckForShortTasks.help: Also send the same lightweight acknowledgement for requests that are not promoted to long tasks.

immediateAckTemplate.label: Immediate Ack Template
immediateAckTemplate.help: Short visible acknowledgement sent right after first long-task registration.

shortTaskFollowupTimeoutMs.label: Short Task Followup Timeout
shortTaskFollowupTimeoutMs.help: How long to wait before sending a delayed 'still processing' note for slow short tasks.

shortTaskFollowupTemplate.label: Short Task Followup Template
shortTaskFollowupTemplate.help: Delayed status message for short tasks that still have not returned within the configured timeout.

syncProgressOnMessageSending.label: Sync Progress On Send
syncProgressOnMessageSending.help: Touch active task progress whenever OpenClaw is about to send a visible message.

finalizeOnAgentEnd.label: Finalize On Agent End
finalizeOnAgentEnd.help: Automatically complete or fail the active task when the agent run ends.

minProgressMessageLength.label: Min Progress Length
minProgressMessageLength.help: Minimum outbound message length before it is treated as a visible progress update.

ignoreProgressPatterns.label: Ignore Progress Patterns
ignoreProgressPatterns.help: Regex patterns for outbound messages that should not count as progress.

enableHostFeishuDelivery.label: Enable Feishu Host Delivery
enableHostFeishuDelivery.help: Process Feishu send-instructions inside the plugin with OpenClaw host runtime instead of CLI message send.

hostDeliveryPollMs.label: Host Delivery Poll MS
hostDeliveryPollMs.help: Polling interval for the plugin-side Feishu delivery bridge.

enableContinuationRunner.label: Enable Continuation Runner
enableContinuationRunner.help: Poll for scheduled delayed-reply continuations and execute them when due.

continuationPollMs.label: Continuation Poll MS
continuationPollMs.help: Polling interval for scheduled continuation tasks such as delayed replies.

enableWatchdogRecoveryRunner.label: Enable Watchdog Recovery
enableWatchdogRecoveryRunner.help: Run overdue-task scan plus guarded auto-resume on plugin startup and on a recurring interval.

watchdogRecoveryPollMs.label: Watchdog Recovery Poll MS
watchdogRecoveryPollMs.help: Polling interval for startup-style watchdog recovery scans that unblock interrupted long-running tasks.
